_publications._publicationTitle: A Systematic Assessment of Accuracy in Detecting Somatic Mosaic Variants by Deep Amplicon Sequencing: Application to NF2 Gene.

_contextSnippet: DNA alterations with VAF higher than 10% were confirmed by direct sequencing...COLD PCR conditions were optimized for both variants, but none of them was verified by direct sequencing
resourceName: BigDye Terminator v1.1 Cycle Sequencing Kit
details: Confirmed variants with VAF ≥10% by direct sequencing, but failed to detect variants with VAF <1.6% even after COLD-PCR optimization
